name: Morph Balls
author: Poki
description: Morph Balls is a challenging rolling-ball platformer where you drag to control your momentum and skillfully navigate tricky maps. Morph your ball to overcome unique obstacles—inflate into a balloon to fly, transform into a soft ball to cross delicate glass floors, or become a heavy ball to smash barriers. Can you master every form and roll your way to victory in Morph Balls? How do I play Morph Balls? Move: WASD, Arrow Keys, or clicking and dragging with the mouse Swap Ball: 1,2,3 keys or clicking on the UI buttons with the mouse Pause: Spacebar Who created Morph Balls? Morph Balls is created by Invent4. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Morph Balls for free? You can play Morph Balls for free on Poki. Can I play Morph Balls on mobile devices and desktop? Morph Balls can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
